name: Create personal Maven repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 Maven 仓库

name: Build Maven project through Artifactory and publish Build Info
name_cn: 通过 Artifactory 构建 Maven 项目并发布 Build Info
hint: cd modules/jas-maven/sample-project, configure jf mvn to resolve from your virtual repo, run: jf mvn install --build-name=<NICKNAME>-jas-maven-build --build-number=1, then: jf rt build-publish <NICKNAME>-jas-maven-build 1
hint_cn: 进入 modules/jas-maven/sample-project，配置 jf mvn 解析依赖后构建项目，最后发布 Build Info

name: Run JFrog CLI audit to scan Maven CVEs
name_cn: 运行 JFrog CLI audit 扫描 Maven CVE
hint: cd modules/jas-maven/sample-project, run: jf audit --mvn — review the CVE report including Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228)
hint_cn: 进入 modules/jas-maven/sample-project，运行：jf audit --mvn，查看包含 Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) 的 CVE 报告

name: Detect hardcoded secrets with JAS
name_cn: 使用 JAS 检测硬编码密钥
hint: Run: jf audit --mvn --secrets — the sample project contains a hardcoded API key that JAS will detect in App.java
hint_cn: 运行：jf audit --mvn --secrets，示例项目 App.java 中包含硬编码的 API 密钥，JAS 会检测到

name: View contextual analysis results in JFrog UI
name_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中查看上下文分析结果
hint: In JFrog UI: Xray → Scans List → <NICKNAME>-jas-maven-build. Contextual analysis shows which CVEs are reachable vs. only-present — the WAR/JAR build provides code context for reachability analysis
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Xray → Scans List → 你的构建。上下文分析显示哪些 CVE 在代码中实际可触达——Maven JAR 构建提供了代码上下文
